title: I Built an AI Wine Deal Finder — Here's What 50 Bottles Taught Me
excerpt: How I built an automated wine price comparison tool for Singapore. Amex Platinum gives you $200 back on wine — but are the base prices competitive? I automated the answer with Selenium scraping, Gemini AI search grounding, and a daily pipeline that runs itself.

title: Building Job Hunter SG - AI Resume Coaching for Singapore
excerpt: How I built an AI-powered job aggregator and resume coaching platform for the Singapore job market. Nightly crawls from MyCareersFuture and Careers@Gov, a 7-stage resume tailoring pipeline, and 5 validation gates to prevent AI hallucination. Born from a real job search frustration and revived by a friend's conversation about resume building.

title: What Mood Is the Market In? An Interactive Guide to HMM Regime Detection
excerpt: Markets have moods. A Hidden Markov Model reads the volatility regime (calm, normal, or stormy) so you can trade with the weather, not against it. Interactive walkthrough with live visualizations.

title: DPO Interactive Demo - Your Language Model is Secretly a Reward Model
excerpt: Interactive walkthrough of Direct Preference Optimization - how to align LLMs with human preferences using just a classification loss. No reward model, no RL, no PPO. Play with the DPO loss calculator and watch training step by step.

title: What I Learned from a Live LLM Serving Gauntlet
excerpt: 19 engineers, 19 A100 GPUs, two hours of Locust fire. I tuned 40+ vLLM configs and scraped peer metrics. Then someone with a 30-line cache proxy beat all of us.

title: LLM Inference: The Theory You Need Before Deploying
excerpt: Prefill vs decode. Why memory bandwidth matters more than FLOPS. VRAM budget math. Quantization methods (GPTQ, AWQ, FP8). Batching strategies. The theory behind every LLM serving decision.

title: Visualizing Weak-Driven Learning: An Interactive WMSS Demo
excerpt: Interactive walkthrough of the WMSS paper — from SFT saturation to logit mixing and gradient amplification. Play with lambda sliders, watch training curves, and understand how weak agents make strong agents stronger.

title: How 468 Facial Landmarks Decide If You're Passport-Ready
excerpt: MediaPipe face mesh, rembg segmentation, 25+ compliance checks, and country-specific rules for 6 countries. Here's how Photo ID Studio decides if your face is passport-worthy.

title: How I Built an AI-Powered Stock Market Dashboard
excerpt: A deep dive into Trader Koo – from using a pre-trained YOLOv8 model to detect chart patterns, to solving the coordinate mapping problem, to running a five-layer detection ensemble every night.

title: I Tried to Predict Singapore's Rain and It Humbled Me
excerpt: Building LionWeather: 8 years of NEA data, LightGBM rainfall prediction, SHAP explainability, animated radar, and a whole lot of lessons about tropical weather.
